steps.title: Spot the transition from general claim to supporting example
steps.content: The opening sentence makes a general counterclaim about industrial activity, and Consider at the start of the underlined portion signals that a specific example will now support this claim.

steps.title: Match the function to the correct choice
steps.content:
Choice B correctly identifies the function: the underlined portion introduces a specific example (the silver-studded blue butterfly) supporting the previous sentence's general claim.

The others misidentify the function—claiming it challenges the species itself (A), suggests future research (C), or provides a definition (D).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
